name: @gjsify/example-node-cli-node-process
description: Demonstrates @gjsify/process and @gjsify/terminal-native: pid, ppid, versions.gjs, stdout.isTTY, columns/rows, env enumeration and terminal resize events.

scripts.start: gjsify run start:node && gjsify run start:gjs
scripts.build: gjsify run build:gjs && gjsify run build:node

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
